seoTitle: Dunbogan vs Duncans Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dunbogan and Duncans Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dunbogan vs Duncans Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dunbogan and Duncans Creek.
heading: Dunbogan vs Duncans Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dunbogan, New South Wales and Duncans Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dunbogan has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Duncans Creek (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dunbogan or Duncans Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dunbogan has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Duncans Creek scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dunbogan scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Duncans Creek scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dunbogan or Duncans Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dunbogan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
